docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $120.00 FILED BY ROXIE FOOD CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-19-1992, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF JUN-05-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROXIE FOOD CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $155.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-24-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM OCT-28-1992 TO NOV-16-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1992, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT FAY KEVIN B
